Motion For Apportionment Of Settlement Funds.
Off Calendar May-01-2008 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order Todistribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar May-01-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing on Motion for Apportionment and for an Order to Distribute Settlement Funds.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Kimberly J. Chu, Esq. for Brayton Purcell LLC. on behalf of Plaintiffs Suzanne Johnson, John Ankele, Robert Ankele, Donna Chaddock, Karen Ankele and Carol Glenn.
Griselda Ankele, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Kenneth Prochnow, Esq. present on behalf of Suzanne Johnson.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the declartions and evidence presented, the Court grants the Motion for Apportionment and for an Order to Distribute Settlement Funds.
Ms. Chu to prepare the Order and summit to Dept. 218 for signature.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel - Civil
Off Calendar Nov-14-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Brayton Purcell LLP'S Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel FOR PLAINTIFF GRISELDA ANKELE.
APPEARANCES: Mei Lin Hom, Esq. of Brayton Purcell LLP 898-1555 moving to be relieved as counsel for pltf; pltf Griselda Ankele also present & opposing motion.
RULING: Hearing held in camera. The Court grants the motion. Order signed in open court. The Court ordered the transcript of this proceeding sealed. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

Apportionment Of Settlement Funds.
Off Calendar Mar-02-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for motion for apportionment for an order to distribute settlement funds Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Paul Vaillancourt, Esq. for Plaintiff: Grislda Ankele, ind and Griselda Ankele as personal representative of the estate of Jack Ankele, deceased, and on behalf of the legal heirs of Jack Ankele, deceased, present, was sworn and examined.
No other appearances were present in court.
After hearing the testimony, the Court have taken matter under submission. Proposed order was received in court.

PM
Order granted and signed by Commissioner Sue Kaplan. See scanned order for details.

Off Calendar Jan-12-2006 Text Ruling

Apportionment Of Settlement Funds.
Off Calendar Jan-12-2006 Continued To Mar-02-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Plaintiff's Motion for Apportionment Proceeding and for an Order to Distribute Settlement Funds Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Paul Vailancourt, Esq. for Plaintiff: Griselda Ankele, also present.
Suzanne Johnson and John Ankele, are also present in court, and disputing the Apportionment proceeds. No declarations were submitted prior to the hearing today, th Court grants a continuance to March 2, 2006 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218.
Mr. Vailancourt to serve notice of the new hearing date to the parties involved.
